channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Woman dies after being thrown from bridge without safety cord
item.description: In videos circulating online, two men launch the woman off Skeleton Bridge as onlookers realize no safety mechanism is attached.

item.title: Tehran and Israel express reservations about U.S.-Iran deal set for Friday signing
item.description: Israel insists its forces will stay in Lebanon, while Iran expects to access half of its frozen assets before final U.S. talks.

item.title: Iran live updates: Israeli minister says forces will not leave Lebanon after U.S.-Iran MOU
item.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, involving large-scale joint U.S.-Israeli airstrikes.

item.title: Trump travels to France for first G7 summit since U.S.-Iran war began
item.description: Held in Évian-les-Bains, France from June 15-17, this marks the president's fifth in-person attendance at the conference amid heightened...
